response.justification: Strong senior IC with broad full-stack and open-source experience, including Linux, architecture work, and a self-founded GIS platform that aligns with the company's open-source ethos. However, the role is executive-level leadership requiring formal Head of Development experience and German at C1 minimum — the candidate lists German as only Basic, which is a hard miss against a stated requirement, and there's no explicit team-leadership or head-of-department track record.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems
Founder of an open-source GIS platform on Linux/Kubernetes — aligns with open-source and digital sovereignty focus
Track record of mentoring via workshops, dojos, and courses (Selenium, Web Internals, TDD)
concerns: German listed as Basic — fails the C1 minimum requirement
No formal Head of Development / team lead title; leadership experience is informal
Resume light on UML, formal architecture modeling, and requirements management artifacts

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal leadership/Head-of role history
